settings.geoTimeout: Igihe cyo gushakisha aho uri cyarangiye. Gerageza ahantu havuye hejuru.
settings.speaker: Orateur
settings.ttlPrompt: Nyuma yiminsi ingahe yo kudakora konti igomba gusibwa?
settings.sqQuestion1: Amatungo yawe ya mbere yitwa nde?
settings.sqSetupDesc: Niba wibagiwe ijambo ryibanga, urashobora kugarura uburyo bwo gusubiza ibibazo 3. Urashobora gukoresha ibibazo byawe bwite cyangwa nibisanzwe.
settings.pwReminderDesc: Kugenzura buri kwezi - menya neza ko wibuka ijambo ryibanga ryinjira.
settings.pwIncorrectDesc: Turasaba kuvugurura ijambo ryibanga mugihe winjiye, kugirango udatakaza kwinjira.
settings.clearCacheConfirm:
Kuraho cache itangazamakuru namakuru yigihe gito?

Encryption urufunguzo nigenamiterere ntabwo bizasibwa.
settings.sessionTooYoungForPwChange:
Isomo rigomba gukora byibuze iminsi 7 kugirango uhindure ijambo ryibanga.

Igihe gisigaye: {iminsi Ibumoso} iminsi.
settings.waitDaysWarning: Iminsi 7 ntirashira. Nyamuneka tegereza {iminsi Ibumoso} iminsi myinshi.
settings.geoDeniedMac:
Kwinjira muri geolokisiyo byanze.

1. MacOS: Igenamiterere rya sisitemu → Ibanga Services Serivisi zaho → zifasha mushakisha
2. Mucukumbuzi: kanda igishushanyo cyo gufunga muri aderesi ya aderesi → Ahantu → Emerera
3. Ongera usubiremo urupapuro
settings.geoDeniedOther:
Kwinjira muri geolokisiyo byanze.

Kanda igishushanyo cyo gufunga muri adresse adresse → Ahantu → Emera, hanyuma usubiremo page
settings.autoDeleteHint: Siba konte nyuma yigihe cyo kudakora

panic.callSettingsNote: Menya: Imyanya ya Force TCP na Relay irashobora kongerera ubuhendutsi ariko iha ubwigenge bwuzuye. Gufunika trafike kongeraho umusumari uteganyijwe mu biganiro bya SDP.
panic.desc: Amakuru yose kuri iyi node azasibwa burundu. Iyi mikorere ntishobora gusubirwa.
panic.warningBody:
Ugiye gusenya burundu amakuru yose.
Iki gikorwa ntigishobora gusubirwaho.
panic.allTracesRemoved: Inzira zose zavanyweho. Iki cyiciro kirarangiye.

privacy.autoKeySyncHint: Urufunguzo rushya rw'icyumba rukerehezwa — ohereza by'ikigereranyo kuri buri kikoresho cyawe (E2E ibitswe)
privacy.backupHint: Bika urufunguzo rwose hifashishwa ijambo ry'ibanga ukabika kuri seriveri. Mu guhindura igikoresho — subiza hifashishwa inzira imwe.
privacy.crossSignHint: Emeza ibikoresho bishya by'ikigereranyo binyuze mu igisina cya HMAC (kurinda gusimbuza)
privacy.federatedHint: Sangira ingingo za backup ibitswe ku nodes za federation. Nubwo seriveri yaburiye — subiza binyuze ku bagenzi.
privacy.historySyncHint: Kopi y'ubutumwa ibitswe iraboneka kuri buri kikoresho. Seriveri ireba inkokora gusa
privacy.ktHint: Iyandikwa ryongerera gusa ry'inyandiko zose z'urufunguzo rwa rubanda hifashishwa ingorofa ya hash (Merkle). Seriveri isinyanura buri kwandikwa — ubinyoma bubonetse mu gihe cy'igenzura.
privacy.linkDeviceHint: Ohereza urufunguzo ku gikoresho gishya binyuze mu kode y'imibare 6. Urufunguzo rwitiriwe ECIES — seriveri ntishobora kubusoma.
privacy.ssssHint: Tanya urufunguzo nyamukuru mu bice N. Bice bibi M byasubiza urufunguzo. Igice cyose cyitiriwe uwo batumanahana bizewe runaka (ECIES). Seriveri ireba blobs zibitswe gusa.
privacy.title: Ubwigenge

contactSync.title: Shakisha aho uhurira
contactSync.desc: Reba imwe muri terefone yawe isanzwe kuri Vortex. Inomero za terefone zirakaraba - seriveri ntizigera ibabona.

keyBackup.passphraseMinLen: Ijambo ryibanga rigomba kuba byibuze inyuguti 8
keyBackup.enterCodeOnMain: Injira iyi code kubikoresho byawe nyamukuru
keyBackup.passphraseEncryptHint: Injira ijambo ryibanga kugirango uhishe. Ibuka - gukira bitabaye ibyo ntibishoboka.
keyBackup.passphraseRestoreHint: Injira ijambo ryibanga wakoresheje mugihe ukora backup.
keyBackup.deleteBackupConfirm: Gusiba urufunguzo rwibanze? Iki gikorwa ntigisubirwaho.
keyBackup.revokeSharesConfirm: Kuraho imigabane yose yingenzi? Gukira binyuze mumikoranire yizewe ntibizashoboka.
keyBackup.splitKeyDesc: Urufunguzo rwa shobuja ruzagabanywa muri N imigabane ukoresheje gahunda ya Shamir. Umugabane wose M uzemerera urufunguzo rwo gukira. Buri mugabane uhishe muburyo bwihariye bwizewe.
keyBackup.minTwoPeers: Nibura urungano 2 rukora hamwe na encryption isabwa
keyBackup.deleteFederatedConfirm: Gusiba ububiko bwa federasiyo? Igice kuri urungano kizagumaho, ariko metadata izabura.

botConstructor.title: Kubaka Bot
botConstructor.subtitle: Kubaka bot yawe mumashusho - nta code ikenewe
botConstructor.welcomeMessage: Ikaze ubutumwa iyo umukoresha atangiye bot ...
botConstructor.defaultWelcome: Murakaza neza! Ndi bot yawe. Koresha / ubufasha kugirango ubone amategeko.
botConstructor.defaultHelp:
Amabwiriza aboneka:
/ ubufasha - Erekana ubu butumwa
botConstructor.docsCommand: Subiza iyo umukoresha yohereje itegeko ryihariye (urugero / ubufasha, / gutangira). Urashobora kongeramo intambwe zo kuganira kugirango ukore intambwe-ntambwe y'ibiganiro.
botConstructor.docsMessage: Subiza iyo ubutumwa bwumukoresha buhuye nicyitegererezo. Koresha regex - urugero "uraho | muraho" bihuye n'amagambo yombi. Urubanza-ntirwumva.
botConstructor.docsWelcome: Ubutumwa bwambere abakoresha babona iyo batangiye bot hamwe / gutangira. Buri bote igomba kugira imwe.
botConstructor.docsScheduled: Kohereza ubutumwa mu buryo bwikora kuri gahunda. Nibyiza kubibutsa burimunsi, gusya buri cyumweru, cyangwa amatangazo yigihe.
botConstructor.docsCondition: Amashami ya logique. Reba impinduka cyangwa umukoresha winjiza hanyuma usubize ukundi ukurikije ibisubizo.
botConstructor.docsRandom: Bot itora igisubizo kimwe kubushake kurutonde. Utunganye urwenya, inama, indamutso, cyangwa ibisubizo bitandukanye.
botConstructor.docsApi: Kora HTTP isaba API yo hanze kandi ikoresha igisubizo mubutumwa bwa bot. Koresha {data.field} kugirango ubone ibisubizo.
botConstructor.docsAdminNotify: Kohereza imenyesha kubuyobozi bwicyumba iyo bikangutse. Nibyiza kubimenyesha, imenyesha rishya ryabakoresha, cyangwa kugereranya.
botConstructor.docsConversationsDesc: Ongeraho intambwe kumurongo wateguye kugirango ureme ibiganiro. Buri ntambwe ibaza ikibazo, igategereza umukoresha igisubizo, ikabika kuri variable. Koresha impinduka mubisubizo byanyuma hamwe na {variableName}.
botConstructor.docsVariablesDesc: Koresha imirongo ifatanye {ihinduka} mugusubiza kugirango ushiremo indangagaciro. Ibihinduka bya leta bikomeza kubutumwa.
botConstructor.docsBuiltinVars: Ibihinduka byubatswe biboneka muri buri gisubizo:
botConstructor.docsVarIsAdmin: Nukuri niba umukoresha ari admin / nyirayo
botConstructor.docsFormattingDesc: Urashobora gukoresha imiterere isa na HTML mubisubizo:
botConstructor.docsTip1: Tangira hamwe na Welcome block - nikintu cya mbere abakoresha babona
botConstructor.docsTip2: Ongeraho / gufasha itegeko ryerekana amategeko yose aboneka
botConstructor.docsTip3: Koresha intambwe zo kuganira kwiyandikisha, ubushakashatsi, cyangwa gukusanya amakuru
botConstructor.docsTip4: Huza Imiterere ihagarike hamwe nibihinduka kumashami yubwenge
botConstructor.docsTip5: Gerageza bot yawe uyiganira mucyumba nyuma yo kohereza

gravitixDocs.title: Gravitix Ururimi
gravitixDocs.subtitle: Ururimi rwimikorere rwimyandikire yo kubaka bots. Ibiranga 96. Inyuma.
gravitixDocs.introDesc: Gravitix ni ururimi rwihariye (DSL) rwashizweho kuva hasi kugirango rwandike Vortex. Aho izindi ndimi zisaba amasomero, guhamagarwa, hamwe na boilerplate, Gravitix iguha ibyiciro byambere byabashinzwe kuyobora ibyabaye, ibiganiro bitemba, hamwe na leta yubatswe - byose mubisobanuro bisukuye, bisomeka byahumetswe na Rust.
gravitixDocs.goalReadable: Isomeka - code isoma nkintego, ntabwo imashini
gravitixDocs.goalSafe: Umutekano - ubwoko bwa static bufata amakosa mbere yigihe cyo gukora
gravitixDocs.goalExpressive: Kugaragaza - gutemba, kurinda, no guhuza imiterere byubatswe
gravitixDocs.goalMinimal: Ntarengwa - nta byiciro, nta murage, nta buryo bwo kwiga
gravitixDocs.whoDesc: Gravitix ni iyumuntu wese ushaka kubaka bot ya Vortex vuba - waba utarigeze wandika code mbere, cyangwa uri umuhanga muburambe warambiwe guteka Python. Iyi nyandiko yigisha Gravitix uhereye kumahame yambere: nta burambe bwambere busabwa.
gravitixDocs.howToReadDesc: Buri gice cyubaka kubibanjirije. Niba uri mushya kuri programming, soma kuva hejuru kugeza hasi. Niba usanzwe uzi urundi rurimi, koresha imbonerahamwe yibirimo kugirango usimbukire neza kubigushimishije.
gravitixDocs.quickStartDesc: Inzira yihuta kuva kuri zeru kugera kuri bot ikora.
gravitixDocs.whatHappenedDesc: kuri / gutangira {...} - isobanura umukoresha ukora iyo umukoresha yohereje / gutangira. ohereza "..." - yohereza ubutumwa gusubira kumukoresha. {ctx.first_name} - ihuza izina ryumukoresha kumurongo.
gravitixDocs.runningDesc: Muri Gravitix IDE, kanda buto yo Gukoresha mukabari hejuru. Injira Vortex Bot Token mugihe ubajijwe. Bot itangira ako kanya - nta ntambwe yo kubaka ikenewe.
gravitixDocs.syntaxDesc: Porogaramu ya Gravitix yubatswe kuva kubintu bitatu byibanze byubaka: abakoresha, gusohora imvugo, na logique.
gravitixDocs.typesDesc: Agaciro kose muri Gravitix gafite ubwoko. Ubwoko bwa sisitemu irahagaze: ubwoko bugenzurwa mugihe cyo gukusanya, mbere yuko bot yawe ikora.
gravitixDocs.operatorsDesc: Abakoresha bahuza indangagaciro kugirango batange indangagaciro nshya.
gravitixDocs.stringsDesc: Imirongo muri Gravitix ni UTF-8 inyandiko yanditse. Bashyigikira interpolation ikungahaye hamwe na suite yimikorere.
gravitixDocs.matchDesc: Igishushanyo-gihuza agaciro kangana nuburyo bwinshi. Tekereza nk'amagambo akomeye yo guhindura.
gravitixDocs.functionsDesc: Imikorere nibishobora gukoreshwa kode ya code. Baragufasha kwirinda gusubiramo no koroshya kode kubyumva.
gravitixDocs.eventHandlersDesc: Abacunga umutima ni bot ya Gravitix. Buri mucungamutungo yumva ubwoko bwihariye bwibyabaye kandi akiruka mugihe ibyo byabaye.
gravitixDocs.guardDesc: Abashinzwe umutekano bakwemerera kongeramo ibintu kumucunga. Umukoresha yiruka gusa niba umuzamu asuzumye ukuri.
gravitixDocs.contextDesc: Ikintu ctx gihita kiboneka imbere muri buri mucunga. Irimo amakuru ajyanye n'ubutumwa buriho n'umukoresha wayohereje.
gravitixDocs.stateDesc: Leta ireka bot yawe yibuka ibintu hagati yubutumwa. Hatariho leta, buri butumwa bwigenga kandi bot nta kwibuka.
gravitixDocs.flowsDesc: Urujya n'uruza reka wandike ibiganiro-byintambwe nyinshi muburyo bumwe, busomeka. Urujya n'uruza rushobora guhagarara no gutegereza ubutumwa bukurikira.
gravitixDocs.emitDesc: Kohereza ubutumwa nibisohoka byibanze bya bot.
gravitixDocs.schedulingDesc: Koresha code mu buryo bwikora kuri gahunda - nta mirimo ya cron, nta serivisi zo hanze zikenewe.
gravitixDocs.pipeDesc: Umuyoboro wa pipe |> utambutsa agaciro nkimpaka yambere kumikorere ikurikira. Bituma ingoyi zikorwa zisomeka, ibumoso ugana iburyo.
gravitixDocs.errorDesc: Gravitix itanga ikosa ryuburyo bwo kugerageza / gufata / kurangiza.
gravitixDocs.structsDesc: Inzira ikwemerera guteranya amakuru ajyanye nubwoko bwiswe. Enum isobanura ifunze ryahinduwe.
gravitixDocs.mathDesc: Gravitix yohereza isomero ryimibare yuzuye hamwe nimirimo ~ 180.
gravitixDocs.complexDesc: Gravitix ifite ubwoko kavukire bugizwe - hamwe na 64-bit ireremba byerekana ibice nyabyo nibitekerezo.
gravitixDocs.calculusDesc: Gravitix ikubiyemo imibare yimibare: ibikomoka hamwe nibisobanuro bibarwa kumikorere uko bishakiye.
gravitixDocs.linearAlgebraDesc: Algebra kumurongo ni imibare ya vectors na matrices.
gravitixDocs.numberTheoryDesc: Umubare wimibare yiga imiterere yimibare. Urufatiro rwibikoresho bigezweho.
gravitixDocs.statisticsDesc: Ibarurishamibare ritanga ibikoresho byo gusobanura, gusesengura, no gufata imyanzuro iva mu makuru.
gravitixDocs.specialDesc: Imikorere idasanzwe ni ibisubizo byingirakamaro zingana.
gravitixDocs.fftDesc: Impinduka ya Fourier ibora ikimenyetso mumirongo yacyo.
gravitixDocs.bp5: Koresha kugaruka hakiri kare kugirango ugabanye ibyari
gravitixDocs.keepLearningDesc: Inzira nziza yo kwiga Gravitix nukubaka. Tangira byoroshye echo bot, hanyuma wongere leta, hanyuma ongeraho flux. Buri gitekerezo gishya wiga gifungura byinshi bishoboka.

bestpractices.h3: 3. Koresha guards aho gukoresha niba-umunyururu kuburuhushya
bestpractices.h5: 5. Koresha kare return kugirango ugabanye ibyari
bestpractices.p1: Ingero n'ingeso zituma Gravitix bots yawe yizewe, isomeka, kandi ikomeza.
bestpractices.p2: Buri bote igomba kugira kugaruka on msg umukoresha kugirango abakoresha bahore babona igisubizo:
bestpractices.p3: Ntuzigere wibwira ko ibyo umukoresha yohereje bifite ishingiro:
bestpractices.p4: Komeza abagenzuzi mugufi. Himura logique igoye kumikorere yitiriwe:
bestpractices.p6: Inzira nziza yo kwiga Gravitix ni ukubaka. Tangira na simple echo bot, hanyuma ongeraho state, hanyuma ongeraho flows. Buri gitekerezo gishya wiga gifungura byinshi bishoboka.

bitwise.cc5: Ibendera ryuruhushya - buri biti ni uruhushya
bitwise.p1: Bitwise abakoresha bakora muburyo bubiri bwerekana imibare. Buri mubare ni 64-bit byasinywe agaciro; bitwise ops ifata nkurukurikirane rwa 64 bit.

builtins.cc5: icapiro / logi wemere umubare wimpaka zubwoko ubwo aribwo bwose:
builtins.p1: Gravitix ikubiyemo isomero rikungahaye. Imikorere yose yubatswe ihora iboneka - nta bicuruzwa bitumizwa hanze.
builtins.p2: Urutonde rushyigikira uburyo-guhamagara syntax yongeyeho imikorere yihariye:
builtins.p3: Soma indangagaciro kuva OS ibidukikije - ingirakamaro kumabanga nka API urufunguzo:
builtins.p4: Ntukandike API urufunguzo cyangwa ibimenyetso muri dosiye yawe .grav. Koresha env("KEY_NAME") hanyuma ushireho impinduka mubidukikije.
builtins.p5: Iyi mikorere icapa kuri seriveri ya konsole - itagaragara kubakoresha, ingirakamaro mugihe cyiterambere:
builtins.td29: Hindura kuri integer (igabanya float, parses str)
builtins.td34: Ibumoso-padi kumugozi watanzwe mubugari (isanzwe pad char ni umwanya)
builtins.td38: Ikintu cya mbere (cyangwa null niba ari ubusa)
builtins.td39: Ikintu cyanyuma (cyangwa null niba ari ubusa)
builtins.td41: Injira ibintu byose hamwe no gutandukanya
builtins.td57: Igihe cyubu nkumuntu usomwa UTC umugozi

complex_type.cc6: Imiterere ya polar: igereranya z kubunini no mu mfuruka
complex_type.cc8: Imizi ya kare kare ya −1 ni i
complex_type.li4: Icyemezo: (a + bi) / (c + di) = [(ac + bd) / (c² + d²)] + [(bc - ad) / (c² + d²)] i
complex_type.li5: Imbaraga: z ** n ikoresha formula ya De Moivre kuri integer n
complex_type.p1: Umubare utoroshye ufite ishusho a + bi, aho a nigice nyacyo naho b nigice cyibitekerezo. i nigice cyibitekerezo cyasobanuwe na i² = −1. Imibare igoye yongerera umurongo nyawo indege, itanga ibisubizo kuburinganire nka x² + 1 = 0 bidafite igisubizo nyacyo.
complex_type.p2: Muri Gravitix wandika imvugo yibitekerezo hamwe na i umugereka:
complex_type.p3: Ibikorwa bine byose byibanze bikora kumico itaziguye. Gravitix ikurikiza amategeko asanzwe yimibare:
complex_type.p4: Gutunganya ibimenyetso (gusesengura amajwi, FFT), ibisekuruza byavunitse (set ya Mandelbrot), kwigana ibya fiziki, kubara inzitizi zamashanyarazi, hamwe na comptabilite byose bisaba imibare igoye. Gravitix igufasha gukoresha iyi mibare imbere muri Vortex bot idafite amasomero yo hanze.
complex_type.td14: Kuva muburyo bwa polar: r · e ^ (iθ) = r · cos θ + ir · icyaha θ
complex_type.td16: e ^ z = e ^ a · (cos b + i · icyaha b)
complex_type.td18: Logarithm yibanze: ln | z | + i · arg (z)
complex_type.td8: Conjugate igoye: a + bi → a - bi

ctx.td14: Nukuri niba uwayohereje ari konte ya bot
ctx.td16: Nukuri niba umukoresha ari umuyobozi witsinda
ctx.td18: Nukuri niba umukoresha afite Vortex Premium

emit.p1: Ohereza ubutumwa kubakoresha bose ID (ingirakamaro mumirimo iteganijwe cyangwa gutangaza admin):

error.p1: Kuzuza kode iyo ari yo yose ishobora kunanirwa muri try. Niba ikosa ari thrown - haba mugihe cya ⟫3⟫ cyangwa mugihe cyeruye ukoresheje code yawe - irangizwa risimbuka catch. Agaciro kafashwe kahujwe nimpinduka witiriwe nyuma ya catch.
error.p2: finally ikora nta shiti - yaba try yatsinze cyangwa catch yakemuye ikosa. Koresha kugirango urekure ibikoresho, log, cyangwa wohereze ubutumwa bwuzuye.
error.p3: Koresha ikosa ryibikorwa kubikorwa biterwa ninjiza yo hanze: kugereranya inyandiko yumukoresha, guhamagara APIs, gusoma ibidukikije bihinduka, cyangwa gukora imibare igoye aho amakosa ya domaine (sqrt yibibi, logi ya zeru) birashoboka. Kubijyanye namakosa yimbere, hitamo guard ingingo na kare returns.

examples.p1: Byuzuye, bots ikora yerekana imiterere rusange.
examples.p2: Simplibyiza byingirakamaro - isubiramo ⟪0ikintu cyose umukoresha avuga.
examples.p3: A simple bot ibara buto kanda kuri buri mukoresha.
examples.p4: Ikibazo-cyo guhitamo byinshi hamwe n amanota.
examples.p5: Umuyobozi wumuntu ku giti cye kuri buri mukoresha.

flows.cc1: ihagarikwa hano, irakomeza iyo umukoresha asubije
flows.p2: wait ihagarika ikiriho flow kugeza igihe ibyabaye bibaye. Agaciro k'ibyabaye ni returned:
flows.p3: Iyo flow ikubise wait, ibika ibintu byose byahinduwe kandi ikaruhuka. Iyo umukoresha yohereje ubutumwa bukurikira, flow irakomeza neza neza aho yagiye. Ibi bibaho mu mucyo - wandika kode y'umurongo gusa.

functions.cc1: guhamagara kuramutsa, nta return agaciro gakoreshwa
functions.p2: Kohereza amakuru mumikorere ifite ibipimo (izina: ubwoko):
functions.p3: Menyesha ubwoko bwa return nyuma ya -> hanyuma ukoreshe return:
functions.p4: Koresha inguni zinguni zubwoko rusange mubipimo:
functions.p5: Igikorwa gishobora guhamagaraself (hamwe no kwitondera avoid bitagira ingano):
functions.p6: Igihe cyagenwe gishyiraho ubujyakuzimu bwo guhamagara (mubisanzwe 200) kugirango wirinde gutondeka hejuru ya0⟫s.

guard.p1: Niba umukoresha atari admin, uwambere wumukoresha guard birananirana, kandi Gravitix agwa kumurongo wa kabiri.
guard.p2: Buri gihe utange umugenzuzi usubira inyuma udafite guard kugirango ukemure ikibazo mugihe guarded abayobora bose basimbutse. Ibi bituma abakoresha burigihe bakira igisubizo.

handlers.cc2: ctx.text ya /echo muraho isi → "/echo muraho isi"
handlers.cc3: Ongera utere everyikintu cyose nyuma yubutegetsi
handlers.p1: Vortex amategeko atangirana na /. Match hamwe na:
handlers.p2: Koresha ubutumwa bwanditse bworoshye (ntabwo ari itegeko):
handlers.p3: Urashobora gusobanura abakoresha benshi nkuko ubikeneye. Bariruka bigenga:
handlers.p4: Amabwiriza arashobora gushiramo impaka. Ubutumwa bwuzuye (itegeko + args) burahari binyuze kuri ctx.text:
handlers.p5: Iyo abakoresha benshi bashoboye match, basuzumwa uko byanditswe. Iya mbere match iratsinda. Ukoresha on msg mubisanzwe biramba nkibisubira inyuma.
handlers.td10: Ibyabaye byose, tutitaye kubwoko - catch-byose bisubira inyuma

if.p1: Irangizwa ryagateganyo: koresha code zitandukanye ukurikije imiterere.
if.p2: Koresha elif kumashami menshi. Gusa ishami rya mbere matching ishami rikora:
if.p3: Gutera byimbitse bituma code igora gusoma. Hitamo return hakiri kare kugirango ushire amashami:
if.p4: Imvugo iyo ari yo yose isuzuma bool ikora nkibisabwa:

intro.li1: Gusoma - code isoma nkintego, ntabwo ari imashini
intro.li2: Safe - ubwoko bwa static catch amakosa mbere yo gukora
intro.li3: Expressive - flows, guards, hamwe nishusho matching byubatswe
intro.li4: Minimal - nta byiciro, nta murage, nta buryo bwo kwiga
intro.p1: Gravitix ni ururimi rwihariye (DSL) rwashizweho kuva hasi kugirango rwandike Vortex. Aho izindi ndimi zisaba amasomero, guhamagarwa, hamwe na boilerplate, Gravitix iguha ibyiciro byambere byabashinzwe kuyobora ibyabaye, ibiganiro flows, kandi byubatswe muri state - byose mubisobanuro bisukuye, bisomeka byahumetswe na Rust.
intro.p2: Gravitix ni kubantu bose bashaka kubaka Vortex bot vuba - waba utarigeze wandika code mbere, cyangwa uri umuhanga muburambe urambiwe Python boilerplate. Iyi nyandiko yigisha Gravitix uhereye kumahame yambere: nta burambe bwambere busabwa.
intro.p3: Buri gice cyubaka kubibanjirije. Niba uri mushya kuri programming, soma kuva hejuru kugeza hasi. Niba usanzwe uzi urundi rurimi, koresha imbonerahamwe yibirimo kugirango usimbukire neza kubigushimishije.
intro.p4: Muri iyi nyandiko yose, → bisobanura "gusuzuma" cyangwa "gutanga", naho // ... bisobanura ibitekerezo byirengagijwe nuwabiteguye.

loops.p3: Menya neza ko amaherezo amaherezo ahinduka false, cyangwa ukoreshe break kugirango usohoke. Igihe cyogukingira kirinda rwose imipaka itagira umupaka hamwe nintambwe ntarengwa.
loops.p4: Iterate hejuru ya every element kurutonde:
loops.p5: Koresha range(start, end) kugirango uzunguruke ukurikije umubare:

match.p1: _ ni wildcard - ni match ikintu cyose kitari match amaboko mbere.
match.p2: Match kurwanya imvugo isanzwe hamwe na /pattern/flags:
match.p3: Koresha blok { ... } mugihe ukeneye ibirenze kimwe statement:

math_calculus.cc10: Ubuso bwumuzingi hamwe na radiyo 1: bigomba kuba π / 2
math_calculus.cc11: Agaciro kateganijwe: E [X] = ∫ x · p (x) dx hejuru yikwirakwizwa risanzwe
math_calculus.cc14: Urutonde rwa Taylor kuri e ^ x hafi x = 0: 1 + x + x² / 2! + x³ / 3! + ...
math_calculus.cc16: Uburyo bwa Newton intambwe: x₁ = x₀ - f (x₀) / f '(x₀)
math_calculus.cc2: Icya kabiri gikomoka kuri x² ni 2 (guhora guhindagurika)
math_calculus.cc7: Ikigereranyo cya f (x, y) = x² + y²
math_calculus.p1: derivative f '(x) ipima uburyo f ihinduka byihuse kuri point x. Geometrike ni umusozi wumurongo wa tangent. Gravitix ikoresha ibice bitandukanye kubikomokaho bwa mbere (ikosa O (h²)) na umwanya wa kabiri-gutondekanya kubikomoka kuri kabiri.
math_calculus.p2: An ⟫0⟫integral ∫f (x) dx kuva a kugeza kuri b ni agace kari munsi yu murongo. Gravitix itanga uburyo butatu hamwe no kongera ukuri:
math_calculus.td15: Umubare wuzuye: [x₀, x₀ + x₁, x₀ + x₁ + x₂,…]
math_calculus.td17: Incamake Σ f (k) kuri k = kuva..ku
math_calculus.td18: Ibicuruzwa Π f (k) kuri k = kuva..ku
math_calculus.td8: Icyerekezo cya feri ya f kuri (x, y)

math_complex.cc10: (−1) ^ (1/3) ifite imizi ya cube itatu mu ndege igoye
math_complex.cc2: bihwanye no kugwiza na e ^ (i · theta)
math_complex.cc4: Imizi yubumwe: n-th imizi ya 1 ni e ^ (2πik / n) kuri k = 0..n-1
math_complex.cc6: Möbius guhindura amakarita azenguruka / imirongo kumuzingi / imirongo
math_complex.cc8: hamwe na = 1, b = 0, c = 0, d = 1 iyi ni indangamuntu: w = z
math_complex.li2: Impaka impaka (z) = atan2 (b, a) - inguni kuva umurongo mwiza
math_complex.li3: Form0⟫Polar form z = | z | · e ^ (i · arg (z)) = | z | · (cos θ + i · icyaha θ)
math_complex.p1: Buri mubare utoroshye z = a + bi urashobora kugaragara nkingingo (a, b) ku ndege ya Argand. Umurongo utambitse niwo murongo nyawo, uhagaritse ni igitekerezo.
math_complex.p2: Imwe mu miterere y'ingenzi mu mibare: e ^ (ix) = cos x + i · icyaha x. Ibi bivuze ko uruziga rugizwe nindege igoye igereranijwe nu mfuruka x.
math_complex.p3: Urusobekerane rwerekana, sine, cosine, na logarithm byongerewe indege yuzuye. Urutonde rwabo rwa Taylor ruhuza everyahantu hose (cyangwa kuri disiki yo kwinjira).
math_complex.p4: Kuri z na w bigoye, z ^ w = e ^ (w · ln z). Ibi biremera kutaba integer kandi bigoye, byerekana isano itangaje:
math_complex.td1: e ^ a · (cos b + i · icyaha b)

math_core.cc1: Amategeko ya cosine: c² = a² + b² - 2ab · cos (C)
math_core.p1: Imikorere yose ya trig iteganya inguni muri radians. Koresha radians(deg) kugirango uhindure impamyabumenyi.
math_core.td17: Tangent = icyaha / cos. Ntisobanuwe kuri π / 2 + nπ
math_core.td21: Inguni ya vector (x, y) uhereye kuri x-axis nziza. Urwego (−π, π]. Igenzura x = 0.
math_core.td22: Imikorere ya Hyperbolic: sinh (x) = (eˣ - e⁻ˣ) / 2, nibindi
math_core.td24: Hindura radian kuri dogere: r × 180 / π
math_core.td25: Hindura impamyabumenyi kuri radians: d × π / 180
math_core.td26: Igiti gisanzwe (ishingiro e). ln (e) = 1, ln (1) = 0. Imiterere x & gt; 0.
math_core.td27: Ikibiri. log₂ (1024) = 10. Umubare wa bits ukenewe.
math_core.td29: Shingiro uko bishakiye: log_b (x) = ln (x) / ln (b)
math_core.td34: Kuzenguruka kugeza hafi ya integer (igice cya kure ya zeru)
math_core.td39: Nukuri niba | a - b | & lt; eps (isanzwe 1e-9). Kugereranya umutekano float.
math_core.td4: Umubare wa Euler, ishingiro rya logarithm karemano
math_core.td43: ² (x² + y²) - uburebure bwa hypotenuse, mubare uhagaze neza
math_core.td45: Interpolation y'umurongo: a + t · (b - a). t = 0 → a, t = 1 → b
math_core.td46: Ikarita x kuva [a, b] kugeza kuri [c, d]

math_linalg.p1: Inzitizi ni urutonde rwimibare. Irashobora kwerekana ingingo mumwanya, icyerekezo, umuvuduko, cyangwa ikiranga muri ML.
math_linalg.p2: Matrix ni 2D umurongo wimibare. Matrike ya m × n ifite imirongo m ninkingi. Matrix ibikorwa bigize intandaro yo guhindura umurongo.
math_linalg.td1: Igicuruzwa cy'akadomo: Σ aᵢ · bᵢ. Ibisubizo ni scalar. Akadomo (a, b) = | a || b | cos θ
math_linalg.td10: Kugwiza Matrix (A ni m × k, B ni k × n → ibisubizo m × n)
math_linalg.td11: Kugwiza every element by scalar s
math_linalg.td13: Kwiyemeza (LU kubora). Ntabwo ari zeru ↔ idashobora guhinduka.
math_linalg.td14: Matrix ihindagurika A⁻¹ kuburyo A · A⁻¹ = I (Gauss-Yorodani)
math_linalg.td19: Gukemura umurongo wa sisitemu Ax = b ukoresheje kurandura Gaussian
math_linalg.td2: Ibicuruzwa byambukiranya ibice bibiri bya 3D. Igisubizo ⊥ inyongeramusaruro zombi. | a × b | = | a || b | icyaha θ
math_linalg.td4: Igice cya vector: v / | v |. Uburebure buba 1.
math_linalg.td7: Kugwiza buri kintu ukoresheje scalar s

math_numth.cc1: RSA ibisekuru byingenzi bishingiye kuri modinv:
math_numth.cc4: Kugenzura Goldbach kugenzura: every ndetse n> 2 ni igiteranyo cya primes ebyiri
math_numth.td1: Igice kinini gikunze gutandukana binyuze muri Euclidean algorithm. gcd (12,8) = 4
math_numth.td13: Inzira zo guhitamo k kuva n
math_numth.td19: Kuzunguruka imibare yubwoko bwa kabiri: ibice bya n mubice k bitari ubusa
math_numth.td2: Nibisanzwe byinshi: a · b / gcd (a, b)
math_numth.td21: Imibare ya Catalonike: ikurikiranye, ibiti bibiri
math_numth.td25: Imibare ya Bernoulli (igaragara muri seriveri ya Taylor ya trig / log)
math_numth.td3: Ibyiza byose bitandukanya n, byatoranijwe. abatandukanya (12) = [1,2,3,4,6,12]
math_numth.td4: Euler's totient φ (n): kubara imibare muri [1, n] coprime kugeza n
math_numth.td5: Modular inverse: x nkiyi a · x ≡ 1 (mod m). Byakoreshejwe muri RSA.
math_numth.td6: Uburyo bwihuse bwerekana: shingiro ^ exp mod. O (log exp).
math_numth.td7: Ikizamini cya Miller-Rabin (deterministic kuri n & lt; 3.2 × 10¹⁸)
math_numth.td8: Primes zose kugeza n zinyuze kuri Sieve ya Eratosthenes

math_special.cc11: Inguni nto: T ≈ 2π√ (L / g) ≈ 2.006s kuri L = 1m
math_special.cc12: Perimetero ya ellipse hamwe na kimwe cya kabiri cy'amashoka a, b:
math_special.cc2: P (−σ & lt; X & lt; σ) yo gukwirakwiza bisanzwe
math_special.cc3: Guhora kwa Apéry: ζ (3) ntabwo byumvikana ariko nta fomu ifunze izwi
math_special.cc4: J₀ (x): kunyeganyega no kubora - bisobanura imiraba ya radiyo
math_special.cc5: Y₀ (x): gutandukana kuri x = 0, kunyeganyega kuri x nini
math_special.cc6: Ai yangirika cyane kuri x → + ∞, ihindagurika kuri x → -∞
math_special.cc7: Igenzura rya orthogonality: ∫₋₁¹ P₂ · P₃ dx = 0
math_special.cc9: Igihe cya pendulum hamwe na amplitude θ₀:
math_special.p1: Imikorere ya Gamma Γ (n) ni ugukomeza guhuriza hamwe ibintu bifatika: Γ (n) = (n - 1)! Kuri Byuzuye. Iraguka kubintu bifatika kandi bigoye.
math_special.p2: Imikorere yamakosa erf (x) = (2 / √π) ∫₀ˣ e ^ (- t²) dt nimwe mubice bya Gaussian. Ifitanye isano itaziguye na CDF isanzwe kandi igaragara muburinganire bwubushyuhe hamwe nibitekerezo bishoboka.
math_special.p3: (S) = Σ 1 / nˢ kuri n = 1,2,3,… (iyo Re (s)> 1). Ihuza kugabanganya kwambere ukoresheje ibicuruzwa bya Euler. Hypothesis ya Riemann (idakemutse!) Ireba zeru za ζ mu ndege igoye.
math_special.p4: Imikorere ya Bessel Jₙ (x) na Yₙ (x) ni ibisubizo byuburinganire bwa Bessel: x²y '' + xy '+ (x² - n²) y = 0. Bigaragara mugukwirakwiza imiraba, gutwara ubushyuhe muri silinderi, hamwe nubukanishi bwa kwant.
math_special.p5: Ai (x) na Bi (x) ni ibisubizo kuri y '' = xy. Bigaragara muri kwantumuneli (WKB kugereranya) na optique (diffaction).
math_special.p6: Iyi miryango ifite abagore benshi ivuka nkibikorwa byabakozi bakomeye kandi bikoreshwa muburyo bwo kwerekana ibintu, kwadratura, hamwe nubukanishi bwa kwant.
math_special.p7: K (k) na E (k) byuzuye elliptike yuzuye yubwoko bwa mbere nubwa kabiri. Babara igihe cya pendulum idafite umurongo na perimetero ya ellipse.
math_special.td1: X (x) = ∫₀ ^ ∞ tˣ⁻¹e⁻ᵗdt. Ikigereranyo cya Lanczos. Γ (n + 1) = n!
math_special.td2: ln | Γ (x) |. Avoid hejuru ya0⟫ kuri nini x.
math_special.td3: x (x) = d / dx ln Γ (x) = Γ '(x) / Γ (x)
math_special.td4: B (a, b) = Γ (a) Γ (b) / Γ (a + b) = ∫₀¹ tᵃ⁻¹ (1 - t) ᵇ⁻¹dt
math_special.td5: Pₙ (x): Imyandikire kuri [−1,1]. Igice cy'imfuruka ya hydrogène.
math_special.td6: Hₙ (x): orthogonal w.r.t. e ^ (- x²). Quantum harmonic oscillator.
math_special.td7: Tₙ (x) = cos (n · acos (x)): ikigereranyo cyiza cyane.
math_special.td8: Lₙ (x): orthogonal kuri [0, ∞) w.r.t. e ^ (- x). Hydrogen radial wavefunctions.

math_stats.cc2: Ni ikihe gice cy'abantu batanga amanota munsi ya 600 kuri SAT (μ = 500, σ = 100)?
math_stats.cc4: Ugereranije abakiriya 2 / umunota, birashoboka ko 5 ari mumunota?
math_stats.li1: r = 1: umubano mwiza mwiza (uko X ikura, Y ikura ugereranije)
math_stats.p1: Uhaye urutonde rwimibare, iyi mikorere yerekana incamake yamakuru yibanze kandi ikwirakwizwa:
math_stats.p2: Covariance cov (X, Y) = E [(X - μₓ) (Y - μᵧ)] ipima niba impinduka ebyiri zigenda hamwe. Ihuriro r = cov (X, Y) / (σₓ · σᵧ) ibisanzwe kuri [−1, 1]:
math_stats.p3: linreg(xs, ys) ihuza umurongo mwiza y = a + bx ukoresheje ingingo zamakuru ukoresheje kare kare. Garuka [slope, intercept, r_squared].
math_stats.td10: PDF ya N (μ, σ²): (1 / σ√2π) · e ^ (- (x - μ) ² / (2σ²))
math_stats.td11: CDF: P (X ≤ x) yo gukwirakwiza bisanzwe. Koresha ikigereranyo cya erf.
math_stats.td12: P (X = k) = e ^ (- λ) · λᵏ / k! gukwirakwiza Poisson
math_stats.td15: Icyitegererezo kuva N (μ, σ) ukoresheje Box-Muller guhinduka
math_stats.td3: Agaciro ko hagati iyo gutondekanye. Kuri na n, impuzandengo ya kabiri yo hagati.
math_stats.td5: Impuzandengo yo gutandukanya gutandukana bivuye: Σ (xᵢ - μ) ² / n
math_stats.td7: p-ijana ku ijana (0≤p≤100). p = 50 ni umuhuza.
math_stats.td8: Ubusanzwe kuri zeru bisobanura gutandukanya ibice: (xᵢ - μ) / σ

math_transforms.cc1: Guteranya ikimenyetso: igiteranyo cya 440Hz na 880Hz sine waves
math_transforms.cc10: Shakisha umwanya munini mubakoresha amakuru yatanzwe
math_transforms.cc11: Akayunguruzo gato-kayunguruzo: zeru hejuru yinshyi nyinshi
math_transforms.cc2: (urugero rw'icyitegererezo = 8 icyitegererezo kuri demo, gukoresha nyabyo byaba 44100)
math_transforms.cc5: Reba ubunini bwa buri bin bin
math_transforms.cc6: Umwanzuro: shyira agasanduku muyunguruzi (kwimura impuzandengo) kugirango amakuru yorohe
math_transforms.cc8: Urugendo-rugendo: fft → ifft igomba kugarura umwimerere
math_transforms.li1: | X [k] | ni amplitude yumurongo f = k · sampleRate / N.
math_transforms.li3: FFT ibara ibisubizo bimwe na DFT ariko muri O (n log n) vs O (n²) - kuri n = 1024 ibyo nibikorwa 1024 vs miliyoni
math_transforms.p1: Urebye urukurikirane rwa N ingero za x [0], x [1],…, x [N - 1], Impinduka ya Discrete Fourier itanga N ibice bigoye bya X [k]:
math_transforms.p2: MP3 na AAC guhagarika amajwi, JPEG guhagarika amashusho, 5G itumanaho rya simsiz, gutunganya ibimenyetso bya radar, hamwe na MRI ishusho yongeyestruction byose bishingiye kuri FFT algorithm. Gusobanukirwa biraguha ubushishozi igice kinini cyikoranabuhanga rigezweho.
math_transforms.td1: Guhindura Byihuta (Cooley-Tukey). xs: urutonde rwa floats cyangwa rugoye. Garuka urutonde rwibintu bigoye. Ibyiza kuri N = imbaraga za 2.
math_transforms.td2: Inyuma FFT. Reconstructs igihe-indangarubuga ibimenyetso biturutse kumurongo.
math_transforms.td3: Naive O (n²) DFT. Igisubizo kimwe nka fft, ikora kuri buri N.
math_transforms.td4: Umwanzuro: (a ★ b) [n] = Σₖ a [k] · b [n - k]. Byakoreshejwe muri FIR muyunguruzi.
math_transforms.td5: Suzuma Laplace ihindure polinomial kuri complexe s

operators.p3: Imirongo yo hejuru ihuza cyane (isuzumwa mbere):
operators.p4: Koresha iminyururu kugirango urengere: (a + b) * c.

pipe.cc2: Hamwe na pipe - asoma ibumoso ugana iburyo:
pipe.cc6: gutandukana (umugozi, gutandukanya) - umugozi ni piped muri
pipe.cc7: gusimbuza (umugozi, kuva, kugeza) - umugozi ni piped muri
pipe.cc8: Sukura abakoresha ibitekerezo mbere yo kubika
pipe.p1: Iyo imikorere ikeneye impaka zirenze imwe, agaciro ka piped kaba impaka first abandi bakajya mumurongo:

quickstart.li1: on /start { ... } - isobanura umukoresha ukora iyo umukoresha yohereje /start
quickstart.p1: Kora dosiye nshya yitwa main.grav hanyuma wandike:
quickstart.p2: Muri Gravitix IDE, kanda buto ya Run ▶ mumurongo wo hejuru. Injira Vortex Bot Token mugihe ubajijwe. Bot itangira ako kanya - nta ntambwe yo kubaka ikenewe.
quickstart.p3: Umushinga Gravitix nububiko bumwe burimo .grav dosiye. Ingingo yinjira ni burigihe dosiye wahisemo gukora.
quickstart.p4: state { ... } itangaza impinduka zihoraho zikomeza ubutumwa. Turabikurikirana byimbitse mugice cya State Ubuyobozi.

schedule.p1: Ibihe muri at biri muri UTC. Niba abakoresha bawe bari mumwanya utandukanye, hindura ukurikije (urugero, UTC + 3 abakoresha: koresha "06:00" kuri 9 AM waho).

state.p1: Koresha state { } guhagarika kurwego rwo hejuru rwa dosiye yawe:
state.p2: Buri murima ufite izina, ubwoko, nagaciro gasanzwe (bikoreshwa mugihe bot itangiye).
state.p3: State indangagaciro zibaho hagati yubutumwa no hagati ya bot itangira. Babitswe kuri disiki mu buryo bwikora.
state.p4: Koresha state.fieldname ahantu hose muri code yawe:
state.p5: Ikarita muri state nibyiza kuri buri mukoresha:

strings.p1: Andika umurongo uri hagati yamagambo abiri:
strings.p2: Shyiramo imvugo iyo ari yo yose imbere muri {} mu murongo:
strings.p3: Urashobora gushira imvugo yemewe imbere muri { } - imikorere ihamagarwa, imibare, kugereranya. Nta karimbi katoroshye.
strings.p4: Koresha inshuro eshatu-ebyiri """...""" kumirongo ikurikirana imirongo myinshi:
strings.p5: Imirongo itatu yasubiwemo ibika umwanya wose hamwe nu murongo mushya nkuko byanditswe. Interpolation {} ikora imbere muri bo kimwe.
strings.p6: Urashobora guhamagara imirongo myinshi yimikorere ukoresheje akadomo - uburyo bwombi burasa:

structs.p1: Koresha impl TypeName { ... } kugirango uhuze uburyo kuri struct. Imbere yuburyo, self bivuga urugero.
structs.p2: Enums gusobanura ubwoko bushobora kuba bumwe muburyo butandukanye. Ibihinduka birashobora kuba byoroshye (nkibisanzwe) cyangwa gutwara amakuru.

syntax.cc2: Ikigero hamwe na interpolation - {imvugo} isimburwa nagaciro kayo
syntax.li2: emit <value> - ohereza ubutumwa; agaciro ni umurongo, uhindagurika, cyangwa imvugo iyo ari yo yose
syntax.li3: Imirongo myinshi emit imirongo → ubutumwa butandukanye kubakoresha
syntax.li4: Abakoresha benshi kuri trigger imwe → yagenzuwe hejuru kugeza hasi, ubanza match aratsinda
syntax.p1: Imbarutso ibwira bot igihe kuyobora umubiri wumukoresha:
syntax.p2: emit yohereza ubutumwa kubakoresha. Nyuma yacyo ushyira agaciro kohereza :
syntax.p3: Buri emit yohereza ubutumwa butandukanye. Bahagera umwe umwe:
syntax.p4: Urashobora kwandika several0⟫ abakoresha. Basuzumwe uko bikurikirana - uwambere guard arengana. Reba Guard Ingingo kugirango ubone ibisobanuro birambuye.
syntax.td1: Ubutumwa bwanditse ubwo aribwo bwose (ntabwo ari itegeko)

types.cc9: State umurima utangira null kugeza wagenwe
types.p1: 64-bit byashyizweho umukono. Shyigikira indangagaciro kuva kuri −9.2 × 10¹⁸ kugeza +9.2 × 10¹⁸.
types.p10: Indangagaciro zimwe zirashobora kuba zidahari. Imirima idahitamo muri ctx (nka ctx.username) irashobora kuba null. Buri gihe ugenzure mbere yo gukoresha:
types.p11: Ongeraho ? nyuma yubwoko bwerekana ko ari hitamo - agaciro gashobora kuba null. Nuburyo imikorere yimikorere na state imirima yerekana "ibi birashoboka cyangwa ntibishobora kuba bihari":
types.p12: Niba agaciro kadashobora kubaho buri gihe, tangaza T? kandi uhore ugenzura != null mbere yo kuyikoresha. Kugera kumurima null ntibisenya bot - ni returns null bucece.
types.p3: 10 / 3 hamwe na int indangagaciro ebyiri gives2⟫ (zaciwe). Koresha 10.0 / 3.0 kubisubizo icumi.
types.p5: Umugozi wanditse Unicode. Imirongo ni indangagaciro zidahinduka.
types.p6: Itondekanya ryurutonde rwindangagaciro, zose zubwoko bumwe T.
types.p7: Kugera kurutonde rutarenze (urugero, nums[99] mugihe urutonde rufite ibintu 5) returns null aho guhanagura bot yawe.
types.p8: Icyegeranyo cyurufunguzo-agaciro kombi. Urufunguzo rugomba kuba ubwoko bumwe, indangagaciro zigomba kuba ubwoko bumwe.
types.p9: return ubwoko bwimikorere idafite return agaciro. Ntushobora kwandika void mu buryo bweruye - nibisanzwe mugihe nta return ubwoko bwerekanwe.

variables.li2: Irashobora kuba irimo inyuguti, imibare, umurongo: user_count, page2
variables.p1: Impinduka zibika indangagaciro ushobora gukoresha no guhindura muri gahunda yawe yose.
variables.p3: Uwatoranije yinjiza ubwoko uhereye ku gaciro kuruhande rwiburyo. Ntugomba na rimwe kwandika ubwoko bweruye - ariko wowe can.
variables.p5: Ibisobanuro birahinduka - koresha mugihe ubwoko butagaragara uhereye kubiciro, cyangwa mugihe ushaka ko code iba self-inyandiko.
variables.p6: Ibihinduka birahinduka kubisanzwe. Shinga agaciro gashya hamwe na =:
variables.p8: Impinduka zibaho muri blok { } zamenyekanye muri. Ntabwo zigaragara hanze yiyo blok:

wizard.title: Gushiraho
wizard.nodeDesc: Shiraho izina ryigikoresho nicyambu. Aya makuru azagaragara kubindi bice kumurongo waho.
wizard.netLocalDesc: Wi-Fi / LAN. Akora adafite interineti. Ibikoresho bisanga mu buryo bwikora.
wizard.netGlobalDesc: Binyuze kuri interineti. Cloudflare Umuyoboro + urujya n'uruza rw'umuhanda. Kwinjira aho ariho hose kwisi.
wizard.cfInstalled: cloudflared yashizwemo - tunnel izatangira mu buryo bwikora
wizard.cfNotFound: cloudflared ntibabonetse. Shyiramo kugirango ushoboze uburyo bwisi yose.
wizard.sslDesc: Hitamo uburyo bwo kubona icyemezo cya HTTPS. Basabwe gukora byuzuye bya mushakisha (mikoro, kamera, WebRTC).
wizard.sslSelfDesc: Byakozwe mu buryo bwikora, ikora muri LAN idafite interineti
wizard.sslMkcertDesc: Byiringiro byuzuye, nta mbuzi za mushakisha
wizard.sslLeDesc: Icyemezo cyizewe kubuntu. Irasaba indangarugero nicyambu 80.
wizard.sslNoneDesc: HTTP gusa. Ibiranga amashakiro amwe arashobora kutaboneka.
wizard.adminPasswordHint: Birasabwa ⟫0⟫ kwishyiriraho mububiko bwa sisitemu. Ijambobanga rikoreshwa rimwe kandi ntiribitswe.
wizard.mkcertInfo: mkcert ikora ibyemezo byizewe mubutaka nta mbuzi za mushakisha. Ubuntu rwose, ikora idafite interineti.
wizard.domainHint: Indangarugero igomba kwerekana iyi seriveri IP
wizard.stagingHint: Ntabwo ikoresha limit0⟫ igipimo cyibipimo, icyemezo nticyizerwa
wizard.noSslWarning: Hatariho HTTPS: mikoro / kamera yo guhamagara, kumenyesha, geolokisiyo ntizaboneka. Mucukumbuzi zimwe zifunga WebSocket nta SSL.
wizard.authDesc: Shiraho uburyo bwo kwinjira kubakoresha node yawe. Urashobora gusimbuka ibi hanyuma ukabyongera nyuma mugushiraho.
wizard.passkeysDesc: Injira ukoresheje biometrike, Kora ID cyangwa PIN. Nta serivisi zo hanze zisabwa - ikora binyuze muri mushakisha / OS.
wizard.reviewDesc: Ibintu byose bisa neza? Igenamiterere rizabikwa kuri dosiye .env nyuma yo gutangira.
wizard.launchedDesc: Gushiraho wizard yuzuye. Gufungura ibice nyamukuru ...
wizard.genCaCert: Kubyara CA hamwe nicyemezo cya seriveri ...
wizard.enterAdminPassword: Injira ijambo ryibanga kugirango ushireho CA
wizard.caInstalled: CA yashyizwe mububiko bwa sisitemu yo kwizerana - ongera utangire amashusho yawe
wizard.sslSkipped: SSL wasimbutse. Node izakora kuri HTTP.

onboarding.step1Text: Kanda hano kugirango ukore icyumba gishya cyo kuganiriraho
onboarding.step2Text: Sangira iyi code n'inshuti kugirango ubatumire
onboarding.step3Text: Andika ubutumwa bwawe bwa mbere hanyuma ukande Enter
onboarding.step4Text: Ubutumwa bwose burabitswe - gusa wowe nuwahawe ushobora kubisoma
onboarding.step5Text: Shakisha Vortex - kora ibyumba, ongeraho imibonano, hitamo igenamiterere

permissions.customHint: Kurenga uruhushya rusanzwe kuri uyu munyamuryango. Ibi birakurikizwa hatitawe ku ruhare rwabo.
permissions.canSendMediaDesc: Urashobora kohereza amafoto, videwo, na dosiye
permissions.canSendStickersDesc: Urashobora kohereza udukaratasi, INGABIRE, hamwe na paki ya emoji
permissions.canChangeInfoDesc: Urashobora guhindura izina ryicyumba, ibisobanuro, na avatar
permissions.canManageCallsDesc: Irashobora gutangira, kurangiza, no kuyobora guhamagarwa kwitsinda
